a: Make a fist with your thumb resting firmly against the side of your index finger.
b: Keep your palm open with your fingers straight and together, folding your thumb across your palm.
c: Curve your hand into a 'C' shape, bending all your fingers and thumb inward.
d: Hold your index finger straight up, while the other fingers curve to touch the tip of your thumb, forming a circle.
e: Bend all your fingers so their tips rest on top of your thumb, which is also folded onto your palm, making a tight fist.
